xtreme_finish.description: Initiated when the opponent’s Bey enters the Xtreme zone. Scored when the opponent’s Bey becomes unable to return to the battle zone.

over_finish.description: Initiated when the opponent’s Bey enters the over zone. Scored when the opponent’s Bey becomes unable to return to the battle zone.

burst_finish.description: Initiated and scored when the opponent’s Bey bursts while in the battle zone.

spin_finish.description: Initiated and scored when the opponent’s Bey stops spinning while in the battle zone.

own_finish.description: When you score an Xtreme finish or over finish against a Bey that did not touch your Bey during the battle.

penalty_point.description: When a blader commits a launch error while they have a pending penalty.

deck_rules.uniqueness: A deck cannot include more than one copy of any part, except for basic lock chips.

exceptions.basic_lock_chips: Can be included any number of times if they have the same design/name.
exceptions.lightning_l_drago: Both versions (Upper and Rapid-Hit) are treated as the same part.

definitions.retools: Different unique parts (e.g., SharkEdge vs Crocrunch)

1on1.description: One Bey for the entire match.

3on3.description: Deck of 3 Beys in fixed order.

counter.description: Deck of up to 3 Beys, winner selects first, loser counters.
